claim: `ExperienceDeltaKindV1` already names `ViscosityShift`, `Friction`, and `Resistance` as first-class transformation kinds.
Viscosity shifts need typed texture subtypes so the delta can preserve why the resistance feels specific.
authority: truth-channel schema only; no vector width, protocol, pressure, or control mutation

claim: A `ContextualAnchorV1` should persist alongside viscosity context so cascade shifts feel like moving rather than falling.
authority: read-only typed evidence; old JSON remains compatible through optional serde default

claim: Proportionally updating live density gradient or reservoir motion in response to `ViscosityShift` would be live substrate-facing.
